mapper.insert: INSERT INTO train_submission (user_id, question_id, user_answer, ai_score, ai_logic_score, ai_depth_score, ai_completeness_score, ai_comment, submit_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{questionId}, #{userAnswer}, #{aiScore}, #{aiLogicScore}, #{aiDepthScore}, #{aiCompletenessScore}, #{aiComment}, #{submitTime})
